mapper.sql: source_id, article_key, concept_id, title, content, lifecycle, compiled_at, created_at, updated_at, source_paths, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, summary, referential_keywords, depends_on, related, confidence, review_status, risk_level, risk_reasons, is_hotspot, requires_result_verification
mapper.insert: insert into articles ( source_id, article_key, concept_id, title, content, lifecycle, compiled_at, source_paths, metadata_json, summary, referential_keywords, depends_on, related, confidence, review_status, risk_level, risk_reasons, is_hotspot, requires_result_verification, search_text, search_tsv, refkey_text ) values ( #{record.sourceId}, #{record.articleKey}, #{record.conceptId}, #{record.title}, #{record.content}, #{record.lifecycle}, #{record.compiledAt}, #{record.sourcePaths,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.StringListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.metadataJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{record.summary}, #{record.referentialKeywords,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.StringListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.dependsOn,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.StringListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.related,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.StringListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.confidence}, #{record.reviewStatus}, #{record.riskLevel}, #{record.riskReasons,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.StringListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.hotspot}, #{record.requiresResultVerification}, #{searchText}, to_tsvector('simple'::regconfig, #{searchText}), #{refkeyText} ) on conflict (article_key) do update set source_id = excluded.source_id, concept_id = excluded.concept_id, title = excluded.title, content = excluded.content, lifecycle = excluded.lifecycle, compiled_at = excluded.compiled_at, source_paths = excluded.source_paths, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, summary = excluded.summary, referential_keywords = excluded.referential_keywords, depends_on = excluded.depends_on, related = excluded.related, confidence = excluded.confidence, review_status = excluded.review_status, risk_level = excluded.risk_level, risk_reasons = excluded.risk_reasons, is_hotspot = excluded.is_hotspot, requires_result_verification = excluded.requires_result_verification, search_text = excluded.search_text, search_tsv = excluded.search_tsv, refkey_text = excluded.refkey_text, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: select from articles where concept_id = #{conceptId} order by updated_at desc, article_key asc limit 1
mapper.update: update articles set metadata_json = jsonb_set( coalesce(metadata_json::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb), '{upstream_corrections}', coalesce(metadata_json::jsonb->'upstream_corrections', '[]'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object( 'from', #{fromConceptId}, 'summary', #{correctionSummary}, 'marked_at', to_char(now(), 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS"Z"') )) ), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where concept_id = #{conceptId}
mapper.select: select from articles where exists ( select 1 from jsonb_array_elements(coalesce(metadata_json::jsonb->'upstream_corrections', '[]'::jsonb)) as elem where elem->>'from' = #{fromConceptId} ) order by concept_id asc
select from articles where metadata_json::text like '%upstream_corrections%' order by source_id asc nulls first, article_key asc
select from articles order by source_id asc nulls first, updated_at desc, article_key asc
